original: 4 . Mettākathā
content: 4.慈的談論

original: 22. Sāvatthinidānaṃ .
content: 22.起源於舍衛城。

original: ‘‘ Mettāya , bhikkhave, cetovimuttiyā āsevitāya bhāvitāya bahulīkatāya yānīkatāya vatthukatāya anuṭṭhitāya paricitāya susamāraddhāya ekādasānisaṃsā pāṭikaṅkhā.
content: [[bhikkhu#比丘]]們！在[[mettācetovimutti#慈心解脫]]被熟習、被[[bhāveti#修習]]、被[[bahulīkaroti#多作]]、被作為車輛、被作為基礎、被實行、被累積、[[yānīkatā vatthukatā anuṭṭhitā paricitā susamāraddhā#被善同一努力]]時，十一種效益能被預期，

original: Katame ekādasa?
content: 哪十一種？

original: Sukhaṃ supati, sukhaṃ paṭibujjhati, na pāpakaṃ supinaṃ passati, manussānaṃ piyo hoti, amanussānaṃ piyo hoti, devatā rakkhanti, nāssa aggi vā visaṃ vā satthaṃ vā kamati, tuvaṭaṃ cittaṃ samādhiyati, mukhavaṇṇo vippasīdati, asammūḷho kālaṅkaroti, uttari[ uttariṃ( syā. pī.) a. ni.11.15 passitabbā] appaṭivijjhanto brahmalokūpago hoti.
content: [[sukhaṃ seti#睡得安樂]]、快樂地醒來、不作惡夢(不見惡夢)、他對人是可愛的、他對[[amanussā#非人]]是可愛的、天神守護、火或毒或刀杖不侵(不走入)、心迅速地入定、面色明淨、死時不迷亂、未貫通更上者是到達梵天世界者，

original: Mettāya, bhikkhave, cetovimuttiyā āsevitāya bhāvitāya bahulīkatāya yānīkatāya vatthukatāya anuṭṭhitāya paricitāya susamāraddhāya– ime ekādasānisaṃsā pāṭikaṅkhā’’ .
content: 比丘們！在慈心解脫被熟習、被修習、被多作、被作為車輛、被作為基礎、被實行、被累積、被善同一努力時，這十一種效益能被預期。」[AN.11.15-AA.49.10]

original: Atthi anodhiso pharaṇā mettācetovimutti, atthi odhiso pharaṇā mettācetovimutti, atthi disāpharaṇā mettācetovimutti.
content: 有無限制遍滿的慈心解脫，有特定遍滿的慈心解脫，有十方遍滿的慈心解脫。

original: Katihākārehi anodhiso pharaṇā mettācetovimutti, katihākārehi odhiso pharaṇā mettācetovimutti, katihākārehi disāpharaṇā mettācetovimutti?
content: 以多少行相有無限制遍滿的慈心解脫？以多少行相有特定遍滿的慈心解脫？以多少行相有十方遍滿的慈心解脫？

original: Pañcahākārehi anodhiso pharaṇā mettācetovimutti, sattahākārehi odhiso pharaṇā mettācetovimutti, dasahākārehi disāpharaṇā mettācetovimutti.
content: 以五種行相有無限制遍滿的慈心解脫，以七種行相有特定遍滿的慈心解脫，以十種行相有十方遍滿的慈心解脫。

original: Katamehi pañcahākārehi anodhiso pharaṇā mettācetovimutti?
content: 以哪五種行相有無限制遍滿的慈心解脫？

original: Sabbe sattā averā abyāpajjā[ abyāpajjhā( syā.)] anīghā sukhī attānaṃ pariharantu.
content: 願一切眾生保持自己無怨恨、無瞋害、無苦惱、得安樂；

original: Sabbe pāṇā… pe… sabbe bhūtā… pe… sabbe puggalā… pe… sabbe attabhāvapariyāpannā averā abyāpajjā anīghā sukhī attānaṃ pariharantūti.
content: 願一切生物類……（中略）願一切生類……（中略）願一切個人……（中略）願一切個體繫屬的保持自己無怨恨、無瞋害、無苦惱、得安樂，

original: Imehi pañcahākārehi anodhiso pharaṇā mettācetovimutti.
content: 以這五種行相有無限制遍滿的慈心解脫。

original: Katamehi sattahākārehi odhiso pharaṇā mettācetovimutti?
content: 以哪七種行相有特定遍滿的慈心解脫？

original: Sabbā itthiyo averā abyāpajjā anīghā sukhī attānaṃ pariharantu.
content: 願一切婦女保持自己無怨恨、無瞋害、無苦惱、得安樂；

original: Sabbe purisā… pe… sabbe ariyā… pe… sabbe anariyā… pe… sabbe devā… pe… sabbe manussā… pe… sabbe vinipātikā averā abyāpajjā anīghā sukhī attānaṃ pariharantūti.
content: 願一切男子……（中略）願一切聖者……（中略）願一切非聖者……（中略）願一切天神……（中略）願一切人類……（中略）願一切墮下界者保持自己無怨恨、無瞋害、無苦惱、得安樂，

original: Imehi sattahākārehi odhiso pharaṇā mettācetovimutti.
content: 以這七種行相有特定遍滿的慈心解脫。

original: Katamehi dasahākārehi disāpharaṇā mettācetovimutti?
content: 以哪十種行相有十方遍滿的慈心解脫？

original: Sabbe puratthimāya disāya sattā averā abyāpajjā anīghā sukhī attānaṃ pariharantu .
content: 願一切東方的眾生保持自己無怨恨、無瞋害、無苦惱、得安樂；

original: Sabbe pacchimāya disāya sattā… pe… sabbe uttarāya disāya sattā… pe… sabbe dakkhiṇāya disāya sattā… pe… sabbe puratthimāya anudisāya sattā… pe… sabbe pacchimāya anudisāya sattā… pe… sabbe uttarāya anudisāya sattā… pe… sabbe dakkhiṇāya anudisāya sattā… pe… sabbe heṭṭhimāya disāya sattā… pe… sabbe uparimāya disāya sattā averā abyāpajjā anīghā sukhī attānaṃ pariharantu.
content: 願一切西方的眾生……（中略）願一切北方的眾生……（中略）願一切南方的眾生……（中略）願一切東方中間方的眾生……（中略）願一切西方中間方的眾生……（中略）願一切北方中間方的眾生……（中略）願一切南方中間方的眾生……（中略）願一切下方的眾生……（中略）願一切上方的眾生保持自己無怨恨、無瞋害、無苦惱、得安樂；

original: Sabbe puratthimāya disāya pāṇā… pe… bhūtā… puggalā… attabhāvapariyāpannā… sabbā itthiyo… sabbe purisā… sabbe ariyā… sabbe anariyā… sabbe devā… sabbe manussā… sabbe vinipātikā averā abyāpajjā anīghā sukhī attānaṃ pariharantu.
content: 願一切東方的生物類……（中略）生類……個人……個體繫屬的……一切婦女……一切男子……一切聖者……一切非聖者……一切天神……一切人類……願一切[東方的]墮下界者保持自己無怨恨、無瞋害、無苦惱、得安樂；

original: Sabbe pacchimāya disāya vinipātikā… pe… sabbe uttarāya disāya vinipātikā… sabbe dakkhiṇāya disāya vinipātikā… sabbe puratthimāya anudisāya vinipātikā… sabbe pacchimāya anudisāya vinipātikā… sabbe uttarāya anudisāya vinipātikā… sabbe dakkhiṇāya anudisāya vinipātikā… sabbe heṭṭhimāya disāya vinipātikā… sabbe uparimāya disāya vinipātikā averā abyāpajjā anīghā sukhī attānaṃ pariharantūti.
content: 願一切西方的墮下界者……（中略）……一切北方的墮下界者……一切南方的墮下界者……一切東方中間的墮下界者……一切西方中間的墮下界者……一切北方中間的墮下界者……一切南方中間的墮下界者……一切下方的墮下界者……願一切上方的墮下界者保持自己無怨恨、無瞋害、無苦惱、得安樂，

original: Imehi dasahākārehi disāpharaṇā mettācetovimutti.
content: 以這十種行相有十方遍滿的慈心解脫。

original: 1 . Indriyavāro
content: 1.根分

original: 23. Sabbesaṃ sattānaṃ pīḷanaṃ vajjetvā apīḷanāya, upaghātaṃ vajjetvā anupaghātena, santāpaṃ vajjetvā asantāpena, pariyādānaṃ vajjetvā apariyādānena, vihesaṃ vajjetvā avihesāya, sabbe sattā averino hontu mā verino, sukhino hontu mā dukkhino, sukhitattā hontu mā dukkhitattāti– imehi aṭṭhahākārehi sabbe satte mettāyatīti– mettā.
content: 23.對一切眾生以無壓迫避免壓迫後；以無傷害避免傷害後；以無熱惱避免熱惱後；以不耗盡避免耗盡(剝奪)後；以不加害避免加害後，一切眾生願為無敵意者而不要為敵意者；願為有樂者而不要為有苦者；願為自安樂者而不要為自苦者：「以這八個行相在一切眾生上行慈」為慈；

original: Taṃ dhammaṃ cetayatīti– ceto.
content: 「意圖這個法」為心意；

original: Sabbabyāpādapariyuṭṭhānehi vimuccatīti– vimutti.
content: 「以一切惡意纏被釋放」為解脫，

original: Mettā ca ceto ca vimutti cāti– mettācetovimutti.
content: 「慈與心意及解脫」為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– saddhāya adhimuccati.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他以信勝解，

original: Saddhindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以信根已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– vīriyaṃ paggaṇhāti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他盡活力，

original: Vīriyindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以活力根已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– satiṃ upaṭṭhāpeti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他使念現起，

original: Satindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以念根已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– cittaṃ samādahati.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他集中心，

original: Samādhindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以定根已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– paññāya pajānāti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他以慧了知，

original: Paññindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以慧根已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Imāni pañcindriyāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti.
content: 這五根為慈心解脫的練習；

original: Imehi pañcahi indriyehi mettācetovimutti āsevīyati.
content: 以這五根練習慈心解脫，

original: Imāni pañcindriyāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā bhāvanā honti.
content: 這五根為慈心解脫的修習；

original: Imehi pañcahi indriyehi mettācetovimutti bhāvīyati.
content: 以這五根修習慈心解脫，

original: Imāni pañcindriyāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā bahulīkatā honti.
content: 這五根為慈心解脫的多作；

original: Imehi pañcahi indriyehi mettācetovimutti bahulīkarīyati.
content: 以這五根多作慈心解脫，

original: Imāni pañcindriyāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā alaṅkārā honti.
content: 這五根為慈心解脫的裝飾；

original: Imehi pañcahi indriyehi mettācetovimutti svālaṅkatā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這五根善裝飾，

original: Imāni pañcindriyāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā parikkhārā honti.
content: 這五根為慈心解脫的資助；

original: Imehi pañcahi indriyehi mettācetovimutti suparikkhatā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這五根善資助，

original: Imāni pañcindriyāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā parivārā honti.
content: 這五根為慈心解脫的隨從；

original: Imehi pañcahi indriyehi mettācetovimutti suparivutā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這五根善隨從，

original: Imāni pañcindriyāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti, bhāvanā honti, bahulīkatā honti, alaṅkārā honti, parikkhārā honti, parivārā honti, pāripūrī honti, sahagatā honti, sahajātā honti, saṃsaṭṭhā honti, sampayuttā honti, pakkhandanā honti, pasīdanā[ saṃsīdanā( ka. sī. aṭṭha.)] honti, santiṭṭhanā honti, vimuccanā honti,‘‘ etaṃ santan’’ ti phassanā honti, yānīkatā honti , vatthukatā honti, anuṭṭhitā honti, paricitā honti, susamāraddhā honti, subhāvitā honti, svādhiṭṭhitā honti, susamuggatā honti , suvimuttā honti, nibbattenti jotenti patāpenti.
content: 這五根為慈心解脫的練習、修習、多作、裝飾、資助、隨從、圓滿、俱行、俱生、相雜、相應、躍入、變得明淨、住立、釋放、「這是寂靜」之觸達：被作為車輛、被作為基礎、被實行、被累積、被善同一努力、被善修習、被決意、被善生起、被善解脫；它們使之生起、使之輝耀、使之猛燒(明亮顯示)。

original: 2 . Balavāro
content: 2.力分

original: 24. Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– assaddhiye na kampati.
content: 24.「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他在無信上不搖動，

original: Saddhābalaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以信力已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– kosajje na kampati.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他在懈怠上不搖動，

original: Vīriyabalaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以活力之力已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– pamāde na kampati.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他在放逸上不搖動，

original: Satibalaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以念力已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– uddhacce na kampati.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他在掉舉上不搖動，

original: Samādhibalaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以定力已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– avijjāya na kampati.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他在無明上不搖動，

original: Paññābalaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以慧力已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Imāni pañca balāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti.
content: 這五力為慈心解脫的練習；

original: Imehi pañcahi balehi mettācetovimutti āsevīyati.
content: 以這五力練習慈心解脫，

original: Imāni pañca balāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā bhāvanā honti.
content: 這五力為慈心解脫的修習；

original: Imehi pañcahi balehi mettācetovimutti bhāvīyati.
content: 以這五力修習慈心解脫，

original: Imāni pañca balāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā bahulīkatā honti.
content: 這五力為慈心解脫的多作；

original: Imehi pañcahi balehi mettācetovimutti bahulīkarīyati.
content: 以這五力多作慈心解脫，

original: Imāni pañca balāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā alaṅkārā honti.
content: 這五力為慈心解脫的裝飾；

original: Imehi pañcahi balehi mettācetovimutti svālaṅkatā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這五力善裝飾，

original: Imāni pañca balāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā parikkhārā honti.
content: 這五力為慈心解脫的資助；

original: Imehi pañcahi balehi mettācetovimutti suparikkhatā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這五力善資助，

original: Imāni pañca balāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā parivārā honti.
content: 這五力為慈心解脫的隨從；

original: Imehi pañcahi balehi mettācetovimutti suparivutā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這五力善隨從，

original: Imāni pañca balāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti, bhāvanā honti, bahulīkatā honti, alaṅkārā honti, parikkhārā honti, parivārā honti, pāripūrī honti, sahagatā honti, sahajātā honti, saṃsaṭṭhā honti, sampayuttā honti, pakkhandanā honti, pasīdanā honti, santiṭṭhanā honti, vimuccanā honti,‘‘ etaṃ santan’’ ti phassanā honti, yānīkatā honti, vatthukatā honti, anuṭṭhitā honti, paricitā honti, susamāraddhā honti, subhāvitā honti, svādhiṭṭhitā honti, susamuggatā honti, suvimuttā honti nibbattenti jotenti patāpenti.
content: 這五力為慈心解脫的練習、修習、多作、裝飾、資助、隨從、圓滿、俱行、俱生、相雜、相應、躍入、變得明淨、住立、釋放、「這是寂靜」之觸達：被作為車輛、被作為基礎、被實行、被累積、被善同一努力、被善修習、被決意、被善生起、被善解脫；它們使之生起、使之輝耀、使之猛燒(明亮顯示)。

original: 3 . Bojjhaṅgavāro
content: 3.覺支分

original: 25. Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– satiṃ upaṭṭhāpeti.
content: 25.「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他使念現起，

original: Satisambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以念覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– paññāya pavicināti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他以慧檢擇，

original: Dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以擇法覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– vīriyaṃ paggaṇhāti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他盡活力，

original: Vīriyasambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以活力覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– pariḷāhaṃ paṭippassambheti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他使焦熱止息，

original: Pītisambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以喜覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– duṭṭhullaṃ paṭippassambheti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他使粗罪止息，

original: Passaddhisambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以寧靜覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– cittaṃ samādahati.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他集中心，

original: Samādhisambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以定覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– ñāṇena kilese paṭisaṅkhāti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他以智在污染上省察，

original: Upekkhāsambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以平靜覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Ime satta bojjhaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti.
content: 這七覺支為慈心解脫的練習；

original: Imehi sattahi bojjhaṅgehi mettācetovimutti āsevīyati.
content: 以這七覺支練習慈心解脫，

original: Ime satta bojjhaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā bhāvanā honti.
content: 這七覺支為慈心解脫的修習；

original: Imehi sattahi bojjhaṅgehi mettācetovimutti bhāvīyati.
content: 以這七覺支修習慈心解脫，

original: Ime satta bojjhaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā bahulīkatā honti.
content: 這七覺支為慈心解脫的多作；

original: Imehi sattahi bojjhaṅgehi mettācetovimutti bahulīkarīyati.
content: 以這七覺支多作慈心解脫，

original: Ime satta bojjhaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā alaṅkārā honti.
content: 這七覺支為慈心解脫的裝飾；

original: Imehi sattahi bojjhaṅgehi mettācetovimutti svālaṅkatā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這七覺支善裝飾，

original: Ime satta bojjhaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā parikkhārā honti.
content: 這七覺支為慈心解脫的資助；

original: Imehi sattahi bojjhaṅgehi mettācetovimutti suparikkhatā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這七覺支善資助，

original: Ime satta bojjhaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā parivārā honti.
content: 這七覺支為慈心解脫的隨從；

original: Imehi sattahi bojjhaṅgehi mettācetovimutti suparivutā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這七覺支善隨從，

original: Ime satta bojjhaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti, bhāvanā honti, bahulīkatā honti, alaṅkārā honti, parikkhārā honti, parivārā honti, pāripūrī honti, sahagatā honti, sahajātā honti, saṃsaṭṭhā honti, sampayuttā honti, pakkhandanā honti, pasīdanā honti, santiṭṭhanā honti, vimuccanā honti,‘‘ etaṃ santan’’ ti phassanā honti, yānīkatā honti, vatthukatā honti, anuṭṭhitā honti, paricitā honti, susamāraddhā honti, subhāvitā honti, svādhiṭṭhitā honti, susamuggatā honti, suvimuttā honti, nibbattenti jotenti patāpenti.
content: 這七覺支為慈心解脫的練習、修習、多作、裝飾、資助、隨從、圓滿、俱行、俱生、相雜、相應、躍入、變得明淨、住立、釋放、「這是寂靜」之觸達：被作為車輛、被作為基礎、被實行、被累積、被善同一努力、被善修習、被決意、被善生起、被善解脫；它們使之生起、使之輝耀、使之猛燒(明亮顯示)。

original: 4 . Maggaṅgavāro
content: 4.道分

original: 26. Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– sammā passati.
content: 26.「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他正確地看見，

original: Sammādiṭṭhiparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以正見已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– sammā abhiniropeti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他正確地導向，

original: Sammāsaṅkappaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以正志已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– sammā pariggaṇhāti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他正確地攝受(緊捉住)，

original: Sammāvācāparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以正語已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– sammā samuṭṭhāpeti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他正確地使之等起，

original: Sammākammantaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以正業已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– sammā vodāpeti .
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他正確地使之明淨，

original: Sammāājīvaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以正命已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– sammā paggaṇhāti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他正確地努力，

original: Sammāvāyāmaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以正精進已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– sammā upaṭṭhāpeti.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他正確地使之現起，

original: Sammāsatiparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以正念已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– sammā samādahati.
content: 「一切眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他正確地集中，

original: Sammāsamādhiparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以正定已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Ime aṭṭha maggaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti.
content: 這八道為慈心解脫的練習；

original: Imehi aṭṭhahi maggaṅgehi mettācetovimutti āsevīyati.
content: 以這八道練習慈心解脫，

original: Ime aṭṭha maggaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā bhāvanā honti.
content: 這八道為慈心解脫的修習；

original: Imehi aṭṭhahi maggaṅgehi mettācetovimutti bhāvīyati.
content: 以這八道修習慈心解脫，

original: Ime aṭṭha maggaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā bahulīkatā honti.
content: 這八道為慈心解脫的多作；

original: Imehi aṭṭhahi maggaṅgehi mettācetovimutti bahulīkarīyati.
content: 以這八道多作慈心解脫，

original: Ime aṭṭha maggaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā alaṅkārā honti.
content: 這八道為慈心解脫的裝飾；

original: Imehi aṭṭhahi maggaṅgehi mettācetovimutti svālaṅkatā honti.
content: 慈心解脫被這八道善裝飾，

original: Ime aṭṭha maggaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā parikkhārā honti.
content: 這八道為慈心解脫的資助；

original: Imehi aṭṭhahi maggaṅgehi mettācetovimutti suparikkhatā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這八道善資助，

original: Ime aṭṭha maggaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā parivārā honti.
content: 這八道為慈心解脫的隨從；

original: Imehi aṭṭhahi maggaṅgehi mettācetovimutti suparivutā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這八道善隨從，

original: Ime aṭṭha maggaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti , bhāvanā honti , bahulīkatā honti, alaṅkārā honti, parikkhārā honti, parivārā honti, pāripūrī honti, sahagatā honti, sahajātā honti, saṃsaṭṭhā honti, sampayuttā honti, pakkhandanā honti, pasīdanā honti, santiṭṭhanā honti, vimuccanā honti,‘‘ etaṃ santan’’ ti phassanā honti, yānīkatā honti, vatthukatā honti, anuṭṭhitā honti, paricitā honti, susamāraddhā honti, subhāvitā honti, svādhiṭṭhitā honti, susamuggatā honti, suvimuttā honti nibbattenti jotenti patāpenti.
content: 這八道為慈心解脫的練習、修習、多作、裝飾、資助、隨從、圓滿、俱行、俱生、相雜、相應、躍入、變得明淨、住立、釋放、「這是寂靜」之觸達：被作為車輛、被作為基礎、被實行、被累積、被善同一努力、被善修習、被決意、被善生起、被善解脫；它們使之生起、使之輝耀、使之猛燒(明亮顯示)。

original: 27. Sabbesaṃ pāṇānaṃ… pe… sabbesaṃ bhūtānaṃ… sabbesaṃ puggalānaṃ… sabbesaṃ attabhāvapariyāpannānaṃ… sabbāsaṃ itthīnaṃ… sabbesaṃ purisānaṃ… sabbesaṃ ariyānaṃ… sabbesaṃ anariyānaṃ… sabbesaṃ devānaṃ… sabbesaṃ manussānaṃ… sabbesaṃ vinipātikānaṃ pīḷanaṃ vajjetvā apīḷanāya, upaghātaṃ vajjetvā anupaghātena, santāpaṃ vajjetvā asantāpena, pariyādānaṃ vajjetvā apariyādānena, vihesaṃ vajjetvā avihesāya, sabbe vinipātikā averino hontu mā verino, sukhino hontu mā dukkhino, sukhitattā hontu mā dukkhitattāti– imehi aṭṭhahākārehi sabbe vinipātike mettāyatīti– mettā.
content: 27.對一切生物類……（中略）對一切生類……對一切個人……對一切個體繫屬的……對一切婦女……對一切男子……對一切聖者……對一切非聖者……對一切天神……對一切人類……對一切墮下界者以無壓迫避免壓迫後；以無傷害避免傷害後；以無熱惱避免熱惱後；以不耗盡避免耗盡(剝奪)後；以不加害避免加害後，一切墮下界者願為無敵意者而不要為敵意者；願為有樂者而不要為有苦者；願為自安樂者而不要為自苦者：「以這八個行相在一切墮下界者上行慈」為慈；

original: Taṃ dhammaṃ cetayatīti– ceto.
content: 「意圖這個法」為心意；

original: Sabbabyāpādapariyuṭṭhānehi vimuccatīti– vimutti.
content: 「以一切惡意纏被釋放」為解脫，

original: Mettā ca ceto ca vimutti cāti– mettācetovimutti.
content: 「慈與心意及解脫」為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbe vinipātikā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– saddhāya adhimuccati.
content: 「一切墮下界者願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他以信勝解，以信根已遍修習為慈心解脫。……（中略）它們使之生起、使之輝耀、使之猛燒(明亮顯示)。

original: Saddhindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti… pe… nibbattenti jotenti patāpenti.
content: 對一切東方的眾生……（中略）對一切西方的眾生……對一切北方的眾生……對一切南方的眾生……對一切東方中間方的眾生……對一切西方中間方的眾生……對一切北方中間方的眾生……對一切南方中間方的眾生……對一切下方的眾生……對一切上方的眾生以無壓迫避免壓迫後；以無傷害避免傷害後；以無熱惱避免熱惱後；以不耗盡避免耗盡(剝奪)後；以不加害避免加害後，一切上方的眾生願為無敵意者而不要為敵意者；願為有樂者而不要為有苦者；願為自安樂者而不要為自苦者：「以這八個行相在一切上方的眾生上行慈」為慈；「意圖這個法」為心意；「以一切惡意纏被釋放」為解脫，「慈與心意及解脫」為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbesaṃ puratthimāya disāya sattānaṃ… pe… sabbesaṃ pacchimāya disāya sattānaṃ… sabbesaṃ uttarāya disāya sattānaṃ… sabbesaṃ dakkhiṇāya disāya sattānaṃ… sabbesaṃ puratthimāya anudisāya sattānaṃ… sabbesaṃ pacchimāya anudisāya sattānaṃ… sabbesaṃ uttarāya anudisāya sattānaṃ… sabbesaṃ dakkhiṇāya anudisāya sattānaṃ… sabbesaṃ heṭṭhimāya disāya sattānaṃ… sabbesaṃ uparimāya disāya sattānaṃ pīḷanaṃ vajjetvā apīḷanāya, upaghātaṃ vajjetvā anupaghātena, santāpaṃ vajjetvā asantāpena, pariyādānaṃ vajjetvā apariyādānena, vihesaṃ vajjetvā avihesāya, sabbe uparimāya disāya sattā averino hontu mā verino, sukhino hontu mā dukkhino, sukhitattā hontu mā dukkhitattāti– imehi aṭṭhahākārehi sabbe uparimāya disāya satte mettāyatīti– mettā.
content: 「一切上方的眾生願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他以信勝解，以信根已遍修習為慈心解脫。……（中略）它們使之生起、使之輝耀、使之猛燒(明亮顯示)。

original: Taṃ dhammaṃ cetayatīti– ceto.
Sabbabyāpādapariyuṭṭhānehi vimuccatīti– vimutti.
Mettā ca ceto ca vimutti cāti– mettācetovimutti.
Sabbe uparimāya disāya sattā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– saddhāya adhimuccati.
Saddhindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti… pe… nibbattenti jotenti patāpenti.
content: 對一切東方的生物類……（中略）對生類……對個人……對個體繫屬的……對一切婦女……對一切男子……對一切聖者……對一切非聖者……對一切天神……對一切人類……對一切[東方的]墮下界者……對一切西方的墮下界者……對一切北方的墮下界者……對一切南方的墮下界者……對一切東方中間的墮下界者……對一切西方中間的墮下界者……對一切北方中間的墮下界者……對一切南方中間的墮下界者……對一切下方的墮下界者……對一切上方的墮下界者以無壓迫避免壓迫後；以無傷害避免傷害後；以無熱惱避免熱惱後；以不耗盡避免耗盡(剝奪)後；以不加害避免加害後，一切上方的墮下界者願為無敵意者而不要為敵意者；願為有樂者而不要為有苦者；願為自安樂者而不要為自苦者：「以這八個行相在一切上方的墮下界者上行慈」為慈；「意圖這個法」為心意；「以一切惡意纏被釋放」為解脫，「慈與心意及解脫」為慈心解脫。

original: Sabbesaṃ puratthimāya disāya pāṇānaṃ… pe… bhūtānaṃ… puggalānaṃ attabhāvapariyāpannānaṃ… sabbāsaṃ itthīnaṃ… sabbesaṃ purisānaṃ… sabbesaṃ ariyānaṃ… sabbesaṃ anariyānaṃ… sabbesaṃ devānaṃ… sabbesaṃ manussānaṃ… sabbesaṃ vinipātikānaṃ… sabbesaṃ pacchimāya disāya vinipātikānaṃ… sabbesaṃ uttarāya disāya vinipātikānaṃ… sabbesaṃ dakkhiṇāya disāya vinipātikānaṃ… sabbesaṃ puratthimāya anudisāya vinipātikānaṃ… sabbesaṃ pacchimāya anudisāya vinipātikānaṃ… sabbesaṃ uttarāya anudisāya vinipātikānaṃ… sabbesaṃ dakkhiṇāya anudisāya vinipātikānaṃ… sabbesaṃ heṭṭhimāya disāya vinipātikānaṃ… sabbesaṃ uparimāya disāya vinipātikānaṃ pīḷanaṃ vajjetvā apīḷanāya, upaghātaṃ vajjetvā anupaghātena, santāpaṃ vajjetvā asantāpena, pariyādānaṃ vajjetvā apariyādānena, vihesaṃ vajjetvā avihesāya, sabbe uparimāya disāya vinipātikā averino hontu mā verino, sukhino hontu mā dukkhino, sukhitattā hontu mā dukkhitattāti– imehi aṭṭhahākārehi sabbe uparimāya disāya vinipātike mettāyatīti– mettā.
Taṃ dhammaṃ cetayatīti– ceto.
Sabbabyāpādapariyuṭṭhānehi vimuccatīti– vimutti.
Mettā ca ceto ca vimutti cāti– mettācetovimutti.
Sabbe uparimāya disāya vinipātikā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– saddhāya adhimuccati.
content: 「一切上方的墮下界者願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他以信勝解，以信根已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Saddhindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Sabbe uparimāya disāya vinipātikā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– vīriyaṃ paggaṇhāti.
content: 「一切上方的墮下界者願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他盡活力，以活力根已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Vīriyindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Satiṃ upaṭṭhāpeti.
content: …...他使念現起，

original: Satindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以念根已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Cittaṃ samādahati.
content: ……他集中心，

original: Samādhindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以定根已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Paññāya pajānāti.
content: ……他以慧了知，

original: Paññindriyaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
content: 以慧根已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Imāni pañcindriyāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti.
content: 這五根為慈心解脫的練習；

original: Imehi pañcahi indriyehi mettācetovimutti āsevīyati… pe… nibbattenti jotenti patāpenti.
content: 以這五根練習慈心解脫……（中略）它們使之生起、使之輝耀、使之猛燒(明亮顯示)。

original: Sabbe uparimāya disāya vinipātikā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– assaddhiye na kampati.
content: 「一切上方的墮下界者願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他在無信上不搖動，以信力已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Saddhābalaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Kosajje na kampati.
content: ……他在懈怠上不搖動，以活力之力已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Vīriyabalaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Pamāde na kampati.
content: ……他在放逸上不搖動，以念力已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Satibalaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Uddhacce na kampati.
content: ……他在掉舉上不搖動，以定力已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Samādhibalaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Avijjāya na kampati.
content: ……他在無明上不搖動，以慧力已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Paññābalaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Imāni pañca balāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti.
content: 這五力為慈心解脫的練習；

original: Imehi pañcahi balehi mettācetovimutti āsevīyati… pe… nibbattenti jotenti patāpenti.
content: 以這五力練習慈心解脫……（中略）它們使之生起、使之輝耀、使之猛燒(明亮顯示)。

original: Sabbe uparimāya disāya vinipātikā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– satiṃ upaṭṭhāpeti.
content: 「一切上方的墮下界者願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他使念現起，以念覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Satisambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Paññāya pavicināti.
content: …...他以慧檢擇，以擇法覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Dhammavicayasambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Vīriyaṃ paggaṇhāti.
content: ……他盡活力，以活力覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Vīriyasambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Pariḷāhaṃ paṭippassambheti.
content: ……他使焦熱止息，以喜覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Pītisambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Duṭṭhullaṃ paṭippassambheti.
content: ……他使粗罪止息，以寧靜覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Passaddhisambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Cittaṃ samādahati.
content: ……他集中心，以定覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Samādhisambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Ñāṇena kilese paṭisaṅkhāti.
content: ……他以智在污染上省察，以平靜覺支已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Upekkhāsambojjhaṅgaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Ime satta bojjhaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti.
content: 這七覺支為慈心解脫的練習；

original: Imehi sattahi bojjhaṅgehi mettācetovimutti āsevīyati… pe… nibbattenti jotenti patāpenti.
content: 以這七覺支練習慈心解脫……（中略）它們使之生起、使之輝耀、使之猛燒(明亮顯示)。

original: Sabbe uparimāya disāya vinipātikā averino hontu, khemino hontu, sukhino hontūti– sammā passati.
content: 「一切上方的墮下界者願為無敵意者；願為安穩者；願為有樂者」：他正確地看見，以正見已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sammādiṭṭhi paribhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Sammā abhiniropeti.
content: ……他正確地導向，以正志已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sammāsaṅkappaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Sammā pariggaṇhāti.
content: ……他正確地攝受(緊捉住)，以正語已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sammāvācāparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Sammā samuṭṭhāpeti.
content: ……他正確地使之等起，以正業已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sammākammantaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Sammā vodāpeti.
content: ……他正確地使之明淨，以正命已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sammā ājīvaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Sammā paggaṇhāti.
content: ……他正確地努力，以正精進已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sammāvāyāmaparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Sammā upaṭṭhāti.
content: ……他正確地使之現起，以正念已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sammāsatiparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Sammā samādahati.
content: ……他正確地集中，以正定已遍修習為慈心解脫。

original: Sammāsamādhiparibhāvitā hoti mettācetovimutti.
Ime aṭṭha maggaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti.
content: 這八道為慈心解脫的練習；

original: Imehi aṭṭhahi maggaṅgehi mettācetovimutti āsevīyati… pe… ime aṭṭha maggaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā paribhāvitā honti.
content: 以這八道練習慈心解脫……（中略）這八道為慈心解脫的{遍修習}[隨從?]；

original: Imehi aṭṭhahi maggaṅgehi mettācetovimutti suparivutā hoti.
content: 慈心解脫被這八道善隨從，

original: Ime aṭṭha maggaṅgā mettāya cetovimuttiyā āsevanā honti, bhāvanā honti, bahulīkatā honti, alaṅkārā honti, parikkhārā honti, parivārā honti, pāripūrī honti, sahagatā honti, sahajātā honti , saṃsaṭṭhā honti, sampayuttā honti, pakkhandanā honti, pasīdanā honti, santiṭṭhanā honti, vimuccanā honti,‘‘ etaṃ santan’’ ti phassanā honti, yānīkatā honti, vatthukatā honti, anuṭṭhitā honti, paricitā honti, susamāraddhā honti, subhāvitā honti, svādhiṭṭhitā honti, susamuggatā honti, suvimuttā honti nibbattenti jotenti patāpentīti.
content: 這八道為慈心解脫的練習、修習、多作、裝飾、資助、隨從、圓滿、俱行、俱生、相雜、相應、躍入、變得明淨、住立、釋放、「這是寂靜」之觸達：被作為車輛、被作為基礎、被實行、被累積、被善同一努力、被善修習、被決意、被善生起、被善解脫；它們使之生起、使之輝耀、使之猛燒(明亮顯示)。

original: Mettākathā niṭṭhitā.
content: 慈的談論終了。
